---
title: "About Me"
---

My name is Mele Mafi, and I am a master’s student at Emory University’s Rollins School of Public Health, scheduled to graduate in May 2026. I am receiving a Master of Public Health in Epidemiology and a certificate in Data Science. I also have skills in R Studio, SQL, SAS, STATA, ArcGIS, and the Spanish language. I am passionate about conducting research that advances solutions to health disparities, and I am seeking opportunities in epidemiology or data analytics.
